pytest_configure,
--available-memoryZ
storez
Set amount of memory available for running the test suite. This can result to tests requiring especially large amounts of memory to be skipped. Equivalent to setting environment variable NPY_AVAILABLE_MEM. Default: determinedautomatically.)

pytest_sessionstartA
    Check FPU precision mode was not changed during test collection.
    The clumsy way we do it here is mainly necessary because numpy
    still uses yield tests, which can execute code at test collection
    time.
